Back to top
View this page

Validation¶

The validation module provides the ValidationEngine for executing checks and the ProfileResolver for profile-based check selection.

Note

For production deployments, consider using the Orchestration module which handles job splitting, parallel execution, and result aggregation.

ValidationEngine¶

The ValidationEngine orchestrates check execution.

from griot_core.validation import ValidationEngine, ValidationOptions
from griot_core.executors import ExecutorRuntime

engine = ValidationEngine(executor_runtime=ExecutorRuntime())

result = await engine.validate(
    contract=contract,
    options=ValidationOptions(
        profile="data_engineering",
        fail_fast=True,
        max_parallel=4,
    ),
)

print(f"Valid: {result.is_valid}")
print(f"Passed: {result.passed_checks}/{result.total_checks}")

ValidationOptions¶

@dataclass
class ValidationOptions:
    profile: str = "default"
    mode: ValidationMode = ValidationMode.FULL
    fail_fast: bool = False
    max_parallel: int = 10
    timeout_seconds: int = 300
    dry_run: bool = False
    sample_size: int | None = None

ValidationMode¶

class ValidationMode(str, Enum):
    FULL = "full"           # Run all checks
    SAMPLE = "sample"       # Run on sample data
    SCHEMA_ONLY = "schema_only"  # Schema validation only
    QUICK = "quick"         # Critical checks only

ProfileResolver¶

Resolves which checks to run for a given profile.

from griot_core.validation import ProfileResolver

resolver = ProfileResolver()

# Get checks for a profile
resolved = resolver.resolve(contract, profile="data_engineering")

for check in resolved.checks:
    print(f"Will run: {check.name}")

Default Profiles¶

  • default: All checks

  • data_engineering: All checks

  • software_engineering: Schema and constraint checks

  • data_science: Quality and schema checks

  • privacy_audit: Privacy-related checks

  • quick: Critical checks only

Auto-Generated Checks¶

The ProfileResolver auto-generates checks from property constraints:

  • nullable constraint → null-check

  • unique constraint → unique-check

  • primary_key → null-check + unique-check

  • is_pii with masking → masking-check

ValidationResult¶

@dataclass
class ValidationResult:
    contract_id: str
    contract_version: str
    is_valid: bool
    started_at: datetime
    completed_at: datetime
    profile: str
    mode: ValidationMode
    schema_results: list[SchemaValidationResult]
    summary: ValidationSummary
    metadata: dict

@dataclass
class ValidationSummary:
    total_checks: int
    passed_checks: int
    failed_checks: int
    skipped_checks: int
    warnings: int
    critical_failures: int

API Reference¶

Griot Core Validation Module.

This module provides the validation engine for running checks against data using executor runtime.

class griot_core.validation.ValidationResult(is_valid, contract_id, contract_version='1.0.0', profile_used='default', mode=ValidationMode.FULL, schema_results=<factory>, summary=<factory>, inheritance_chain=<factory>, started_at=None, completed_at=None, duration_ms=None, errors=<factory>, warnings=<factory>)[source]¶

Complete result of a validation run.

This is the top-level result returned by the validation engine after validating a contract against data.

Parameters:

  • is_valid (bool)

  • contract_id (str)

  • contract_version (str)

  • profile_used (str)

  • mode (ValidationMode)

  • schema_results (List[SchemaValidationResult])

  • summary (ValidationSummary)

  • inheritance_chain (List[str])

  • started_at (datetime | None)

  • completed_at (datetime | None)

  • duration_ms (float | None)

  • errors (List[str])

  • warnings (List[str])

is_valid¶

Whether the validation passed (no critical failures)

Type:

bool

contract_id¶

ID of the contract that was validated

Type:

str

contract_version¶

Version of the contract

Type:

str

profile_used¶

The execution profile that was used

Type:

str

mode¶

The validation mode that was used

Type:

griot_core.validation.result.ValidationMode

schema_results¶

Results for each schema in the contract

Type:

List[griot_core.validation.result.SchemaValidationResult]

summary¶

Summary statistics

Type:

griot_core.validation.result.ValidationSummary

inheritance_chain¶

Contract inheritance chain (if resolved)

Type:

List[str]

started_at¶

When validation started

Type:

datetime.datetime | None

completed_at¶

When validation completed

Type:

datetime.datetime | None

duration_ms¶

Total duration in milliseconds

Type:

float | None

errors¶

Any errors that occurred during validation

Type:

List[str]

warnings¶

Any warnings from validation

Type:

List[str]

add_schema_result(result)[source]¶

Add a schema result and update summary.

Parameters:

result (SchemaValidationResult)

Return type:

None

completed_at: datetime | None = None¶
contract_version: str = '1.0.0'¶
duration_ms: float | None = None¶
get_all_critical_failures()[source]¶

Get all critical failures across all schemas.

Return type:

List[CheckExecutionResult]

get_all_failures()[source]¶

Get all failed checks across all schemas.

Return type:

List[CheckExecutionResult]

get_schema_result(schema_id)[source]¶

Get the result for a specific schema.

Parameters:

schema_id (str)

Return type:

SchemaValidationResult | None

mode: ValidationMode = 'full'¶
profile_used: str = 'default'¶
started_at: datetime | None = None¶
to_dict()[source]¶

Convert the result to a dictionary.

Return type:

Dict[str, Any]

is_valid: bool¶
contract_id: str¶
schema_results: List[SchemaValidationResult]¶
summary: ValidationSummary¶
inheritance_chain: List[str]¶
errors: List[str]¶
warnings: List[str]¶
class griot_core.validation.SchemaValidationResult(schema_id, schema_name, is_valid, check_results=<factory>, total_checks=0, passed_checks=0, failed_checks=0, critical_failures=0, warnings=0, skipped_checks=0)[source]¶

Result of validating a single schema.

Parameters:

  • schema_id (str)

  • schema_name (str)

  • is_valid (bool)

  • check_results (List[CheckExecutionResult])

  • total_checks (int)

  • passed_checks (int)

  • failed_checks (int)

  • critical_failures (int)

  • warnings (int)

  • skipped_checks (int)

schema_id¶

ID of the schema that was validated

Type:

str

schema_name¶

Name of the schema

Type:

str

is_valid¶

Whether all checks passed

Type:

bool

check_results¶

Results of individual check executions

Type:

List[griot_core.validation.result.CheckExecutionResult]

total_checks¶

Total number of checks run

Type:

int

passed_checks¶

Number of checks that passed

Type:

int

failed_checks¶

Number of checks that failed

Type:

int

critical_failures¶

Number of critical checks that failed

Type:

int

warnings¶

Number of warning-level failures

Type:

int

skipped_checks¶

Number of checks that were skipped

Type:

int

add_result(result)[source]¶

Add a check result and update counts.

Parameters:

result (CheckExecutionResult)

Return type:

None

critical_failures: int = 0¶
failed_checks: int = 0¶
get_critical_failures()[source]¶

Get all critical failures.

Return type:

List[CheckExecutionResult]

get_failed_checks()[source]¶

Get all failed check results.

Return type:

List[CheckExecutionResult]

passed_checks: int = 0¶
skipped_checks: int = 0¶
total_checks: int = 0¶
warnings: int = 0¶
schema_id: str¶
schema_name: str¶
is_valid: bool¶
check_results: List[CheckExecutionResult]¶
class griot_core.validation.CheckExecutionResult(check_name, status, severity=Severity.WARNING, metric_value=None, threshold=None, operator=None, details=<factory>, samples=<factory>, error_message=None, execution_time_ms=None, executor_id=None, executor_version=None)[source]¶

Result of executing a single check.

Parameters:

  • check_name (str)

  • status (CheckStatus)

  • severity (Severity)

  • metric_value (float | None)

  • threshold (float | None)

  • operator (str | None)

  • details (Dict[str, Any])

  • samples (List[Dict[str, Any]])

  • error_message (str | None)

  • execution_time_ms (float | None)

  • executor_id (str | None)

  • executor_version (str | None)

check_name¶

Name of the check that was executed

Type:

str

status¶

Execution status (passed, failed, skipped, error)

Type:

griot_core.validation.result.CheckStatus

passed¶

Whether the check passed (alias for status == PASSED)

severity¶

Severity level of the check

Type:

griot_core.models.enums.Severity

metric_value¶

The computed metric value

Type:

float | None

threshold¶

The threshold that was applied

Type:

float | None

operator¶

The comparison operator used

Type:

str | None

details¶

Additional details about the check

Type:

Dict[str, Any]

samples¶

Sample rows that failed (for debugging)

Type:

List[Dict[str, Any]]

error_message¶

Error message if status is ERROR

Type:

str | None

execution_time_ms¶

How long the check took to run

Type:

float | None

executor_id¶

ID of the executor that ran the check

Type:

str | None

executor_version¶

Version of the executor

Type:

str | None

error_message: str | None = None¶
execution_time_ms: float | None = None¶
executor_id: str | None = None¶
executor_version: str | None = None¶
property failed: bool¶

Whether the check failed.

property is_critical: bool¶

Whether this is a critical check.

metric_value: float | None = None¶
operator: str | None = None¶
property passed: bool¶

Whether the check passed.

severity: Severity = 'warning'¶
threshold: float | None = None¶
check_name: str¶
status: CheckStatus¶
details: Dict[str, Any]¶
samples: List[Dict[str, Any]]¶
class griot_core.validation.ValidationSummary(total_schemas=0, valid_schemas=0, invalid_schemas=0, total_checks=0, passed_checks=0, failed_checks=0, critical_failures=0, warnings=0, skipped_checks=0, error_checks=0)[source]¶

Summary of a validation run.

Provides high-level statistics about the validation.

Parameters:

  • total_schemas (int)

  • valid_schemas (int)

  • invalid_schemas (int)

  • total_checks (int)

  • passed_checks (int)

  • failed_checks (int)

  • critical_failures (int)

  • warnings (int)

  • skipped_checks (int)

  • error_checks (int)

critical_failures: int = 0¶
error_checks: int = 0¶
failed_checks: int = 0¶
invalid_schemas: int = 0¶
property pass_rate: float¶

Calculate the overall pass rate.

passed_checks: int = 0¶
skipped_checks: int = 0¶
total_checks: int = 0¶
total_schemas: int = 0¶
valid_schemas: int = 0¶
warnings: int = 0¶
class griot_core.validation.ValidationMode(*values)[source]¶

Mode of validation execution.

FULL = 'full'¶
SAMPLE = 'sample'¶
SCHEMA_ONLY = 'schema_only'¶
QUICK = 'quick'¶
class griot_core.validation.CheckStatus(*values)[source]¶

Status of a check execution.

PASSED = 'passed'¶
FAILED = 'failed'¶
SKIPPED = 'skipped'¶
ERROR = 'error'¶
class griot_core.validation.ValidationContext(contract_id, contract_version, resolved_contract, options=<factory>, profile_config=None, environment='production', metadata=<factory>)[source]¶

Context for a validation run.

Contains all the information needed to run validation, including the resolved contract, options, and runtime state.

Parameters:

  • contract_id (str)

  • contract_version (str)

  • resolved_contract (Dict[str, Any])

  • options (ValidationOptions)

  • profile_config (ProfileConfig | None)

  • environment (str)

  • metadata (Dict[str, Any])

contract_id¶

ID of the contract being validated

Type:

str

contract_version¶

Version of the contract

Type:

str

resolved_contract¶

The fully resolved contract (inheritance applied)

Type:

Dict[str, Any]

options¶

Validation options

Type:

griot_core.validation.types.ValidationOptions

profile_config¶

Resolved profile configuration

Type:

griot_core.validation.types.ProfileConfig | None

environment¶

Current environment

Type:

str

metadata¶

Additional metadata for the run

Type:

Dict[str, Any]

environment: str = 'production'¶

Get the checks that should run for a schema.

Applies profile filtering to determine which checks to run.

Parameters:

schema_id (str) – ID of the schema

Returns:

List of check configurations to run

Return type:

List[Dict[str, Any]]

profile_config: ProfileConfig | None = None¶
contract_id: str¶
contract_version: str¶
resolved_contract: Dict[str, Any]¶
options: ValidationOptions¶
metadata: Dict[str, Any]¶
class griot_core.validation.ValidationOptions(profile='default', environment='production', sample_size=None, timeout_seconds=300, fail_fast=False, include_samples=True, max_samples=10, dry_run=False, parallel_checks=True)[source]¶

Options for a validation run.

Parameters:

  • profile (str)

  • environment (str)

  • sample_size (int | None)

  • timeout_seconds (int)

  • fail_fast (bool)

  • include_samples (bool)

  • max_samples (int)

  • dry_run (bool)

  • parallel_checks (bool)

profile¶

Profile to use for validation

Type:

str

environment¶

Environment to validate in (prod, staging, dev)

Type:

str

sample_size¶

Optional sample size for sampling validation

Type:

int | None

timeout_seconds¶

Maximum time for validation

Type:

int

fail_fast¶

Stop on first critical failure

Type:

bool

include_samples¶

Include sample failed rows in results

Type:

bool

max_samples¶

Maximum number of sample rows to include

Type:

int

dry_run¶

If True, don’t actually run checks (just validate config)

Type:

bool

parallel_checks¶

Run checks in parallel where possible

Type:

bool

dry_run: bool = False¶
environment: str = 'production'¶
fail_fast: bool = False¶
include_samples: bool = True¶
max_samples: int = 10¶
parallel_checks: bool = True¶
profile: str = 'default'¶
sample_size: int | None = None¶
timeout_seconds: int = 300¶
class griot_core.validation.ProfileConfig(name, description='', checks_include=<factory>, checks_exclude=<factory>, runtime_preference=<factory>, timeout_override=None, sample_size_override=None)[source]¶

Configuration for an execution profile.

Profiles allow different teams to run different subsets of checks with different runtime preferences.

Parameters:

  • name (str)

  • description (str)

  • checks_include (List[str])

  • checks_exclude (List[str])

  • runtime_preference (List[Runtime])

  • timeout_override (int | None)

  • sample_size_override (int | None)

name¶

Profile name (e.g., “data_engineering”)

Type:

str

description¶

Human-readable description

Type:

str

checks_include¶

Checks to include (list or “all”)

Type:

List[str]

checks_exclude¶

Checks to exclude

Type:

List[str]

runtime_preference¶

Preferred runtimes in order

Type:

List[griot_core.models.enums.Runtime]

timeout_override¶

Override default timeout

Type:

int | None

sample_size_override¶

Override default sample size

Type:

int | None

description: str = ''¶
sample_size_override: int | None = None¶
should_run_check(check_name, check_type, check_tags)[source]¶

Determine if a check should run under this profile.

Parameters:

  • check_name (str) – Name of the check

  • check_type (str) – Type of the check (data_quality, privacy, etc.)

  • check_tags (List[str]) – Tags on the check

Returns:

True if the check should run

Return type:

bool

timeout_override: int | None = None¶
name: str¶
checks_include: List[str]¶
checks_exclude: List[str]¶
runtime_preference: List[Runtime]¶
class griot_core.validation.ProfileResolver(auto_checks_enabled=True)[source]¶

Resolves execution profiles from contracts.

Determines which checks to run based on the profile configuration, including auto-generated checks from property constraints.

Example

>>> resolver = ProfileResolver()
>>> profile = resolver.resolve(contract, "data_engineering")
>>> for check in profile.checks:
...     print(f"{check.check.name}: {check.check.executor}")
Parameters:

auto_checks_enabled (bool)

DEFAULT_PROFILES = {'data_engineering': {'checks_exclude': [], 'checks_include': ['all'], 'description': 'Full validation for data pipelines', 'runtime_preference': ['container']}, 'data_science': {'checks_exclude': ['type:privacy'], 'checks_include': ['type:data_quality'], 'description': 'Distribution and drift analysis', 'runtime_preference': ['container']}, 'default': {'checks_exclude': [], 'checks_include': ['all'], 'description': 'Default profile - runs all checks', 'runtime_preference': ['wasm', 'container']}, 'privacy_audit': {'checks_exclude': [], 'checks_include': ['type:privacy', 'auto:pii_masking'], 'description': 'Privacy and compliance validation', 'runtime_preference': ['container']}, 'quick': {'checks_exclude': [], 'checks_include': ['severity:critical'], 'description': 'Quick validation - critical checks only', 'runtime_preference': ['wasm']}, 'software_engineering': {'checks_exclude': [], 'checks_include': ['auto:constraints'], 'description': 'Schema validation for APIs', 'runtime_preference': ['wasm']}}¶
__init__(auto_checks_enabled=True)[source]¶

Initialize the profile resolver.

Parameters:

auto_checks_enabled (bool) – Whether to generate auto checks from constraints

list_profiles(contract=None)[source]¶

List available profiles.

Parameters:

contract (Contract | None)

Return type:

List[str]

resolve(contract, profile_name='default', environment='production')[source]¶

Resolve a profile for a contract.

Parameters:

  • contract (Contract) – The contract to resolve profile for

  • profile_name (str) – Name of the profile to use

  • environment (str) – Environment (for conditional checks)

Returns:

ResolvedProfile with checks to run

Return type:

ResolvedProfile

class griot_core.validation.ResolvedProfile(name, description, checks, runtime_preference, timeout_seconds=300, sample_size=None, fail_fast=False)[source]¶

A resolved execution profile.

Contains the checks to run and runtime preferences.

Parameters:

  • name (str)

  • description (str)

  • checks (List[ResolvedCheck])

  • runtime_preference (List[Runtime])

  • timeout_seconds (int)

  • sample_size (int | None)

  • fail_fast (bool)

fail_fast: bool = False¶
get_checks_by_type(check_type)[source]¶

Get checks of a specific type.

Parameters:

check_type (CheckType)

Return type:

List[ResolvedCheck]

get_critical_checks()[source]¶

Get all critical checks.

Return type:

List[ResolvedCheck]

sample_size: int | None = None¶
timeout_seconds: int = 300¶
name: str¶
description: str¶
checks: List[ResolvedCheck]¶
runtime_preference: List[Runtime]¶
class griot_core.validation.ResolvedCheck(check, source, auto_generated=False, priority=0)[source]¶

A check resolved for execution.

Contains all information needed to execute the check.

Parameters:

  • check (Check)

  • source (str)

  • auto_generated (bool)

  • priority (int)

auto_generated: bool = False¶
priority: int = 0¶
check: Check¶
source: str¶
class griot_core.validation.ValidationEngine(registry=None, executor_runtime=None, executor_registry=None, connector_registry=None, contract_resolver=None, profile_resolver=None)[source]¶

Main validation engine that orchestrates check execution.

The engine is responsible for: - Resolving contract inheritance - Resolving profiles to determine which checks to run - Fetching data from connectors - Executing checks via executor runtime - Building comprehensive validation results

IMPORTANT: This class does NOT import any DataFrame libraries. All data processing happens inside executors (WASM/Container).

Example

>>> engine = ValidationEngine(
...     registry=registry_client,
...     executor_runtime=ExecutorRuntime(),
...     executor_registry=ExecutorRegistry(),
... )
>>> result = await engine.validate(
...     contract_id="my-contract",
...     profile="data_engineering",
... )
>>> print(f"Valid: {result.is_valid}")
Parameters:

  • registry (Optional[RegistryClient])

  • executor_runtime (Optional[ExecutorRuntime])

  • executor_registry (Optional[ExecutorRegistry])

  • connector_registry (Optional[Dict[str, DataConnector]])

  • contract_resolver (Optional[ContractResolver])

  • profile_resolver (Optional[ProfileResolver])

__init__(registry=None, executor_runtime=None, executor_registry=None, connector_registry=None, contract_resolver=None, profile_resolver=None)[source]¶

Initialize the validation engine.

Parameters:

  • registry (RegistryClient | None) – Client for fetching contracts and schemas

  • executor_runtime (ExecutorRuntime | None) – Runtime for executing checks

  • executor_registry (ExecutorRegistry | None) – Registry for fetching executor specs

  • connector_registry (Dict[str, DataConnector] | None) – Registry of data connectors

  • contract_resolver (ContractResolver | None) – Resolver for contract inheritance

  • profile_resolver (ProfileResolver | None) – Resolver for execution profiles

get_available_profiles(contract)[source]¶

Get available profiles for a contract.

Parameters:

contract (Contract)

Return type:

List[str]

get_runtime_capabilities()[source]¶

Get information about available runtimes.

Return type:

Dict[str, Any]

async validate(contract, profile='default', environment='production', options=None, arrow_data=None)[source]¶

Run validation for a contract.

Parameters:

  • contract (Contract) – The contract to validate

  • profile (str) – Execution profile name

  • environment (str) – Environment (prod, staging, dev)

  • options (ValidationOptions | None) – Validation options

  • arrow_data (Dict[str, bytes] | None) – Pre-fetched Arrow data keyed by schema ID

Returns:

ValidationResult with check results

Return type:

ValidationResult

async validate_contract_id(contract_id, profile='default', environment='production', sample_size=None)[source]¶

Validate by contract ID (fetches from registry).

Parameters:

  • contract_id (str) – Contract ID to validate

  • profile (str) – Execution profile

  • environment (str) – Environment

  • sample_size (int | None) – Optional sample size

Returns:

ValidationResult

Return type:

ValidationResult

async validate_with_data(contract, data, profile='default', options=None)[source]¶

Validate with pre-provided Arrow data.

Parameters:

  • contract (Contract) – The contract to validate

  • data (Dict[str, bytes]) – Arrow IPC data keyed by schema ID

  • profile (str) – Execution profile name

  • options (ValidationOptions | None) – Validation options

Returns:

ValidationResult

Return type:

ValidationResult

Validation engine for orchestrating check execution.

The ValidationEngine is the main entry point for running validations. It orchestrates the entire validation process: 1. Resolve contract inheritance 2. Resolve profile and checks 3. Connect to data sources 4. Execute checks via executor runtime 5. Build and return results

class griot_core.validation.engine.RegistryClient(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Protocol for registry client.

fetch_contract(contract_id)[source]¶

Fetch a contract by ID.

Parameters:

contract_id (str)

Return type:

Contract

fetch_schema(schema_ref)[source]¶

Fetch a schema by reference.

Parameters:

schema_ref (str)

Return type:

Schema

class griot_core.validation.engine.ValidationEngine(registry=None, executor_runtime=None, executor_registry=None, connector_registry=None, contract_resolver=None, profile_resolver=None)[source]¶

Main validation engine that orchestrates check execution.

The engine is responsible for: - Resolving contract inheritance - Resolving profiles to determine which checks to run - Fetching data from connectors - Executing checks via executor runtime - Building comprehensive validation results

IMPORTANT: This class does NOT import any DataFrame libraries. All data processing happens inside executors (WASM/Container).

Example

>>> engine = ValidationEngine(
...     registry=registry_client,
...     executor_runtime=ExecutorRuntime(),
...     executor_registry=ExecutorRegistry(),
... )
>>> result = await engine.validate(
...     contract_id="my-contract",
...     profile="data_engineering",
... )
>>> print(f"Valid: {result.is_valid}")
Parameters:

  • registry (Optional[RegistryClient])

  • executor_runtime (Optional[ExecutorRuntime])

  • executor_registry (Optional[ExecutorRegistry])

  • connector_registry (Optional[Dict[str, DataConnector]])

  • contract_resolver (Optional[ContractResolver])

  • profile_resolver (Optional[ProfileResolver])

__init__(registry=None, executor_runtime=None, executor_registry=None, connector_registry=None, contract_resolver=None, profile_resolver=None)[source]¶

Initialize the validation engine.

Parameters:

  • registry (RegistryClient | None) – Client for fetching contracts and schemas

  • executor_runtime (ExecutorRuntime | None) – Runtime for executing checks

  • executor_registry (ExecutorRegistry | None) – Registry for fetching executor specs

  • connector_registry (Dict[str, DataConnector] | None) – Registry of data connectors

  • contract_resolver (ContractResolver | None) – Resolver for contract inheritance

  • profile_resolver (ProfileResolver | None) – Resolver for execution profiles

async validate(contract, profile='default', environment='production', options=None, arrow_data=None)[source]¶

Run validation for a contract.

Parameters:

  • contract (Contract) – The contract to validate

  • profile (str) – Execution profile name

  • environment (str) – Environment (prod, staging, dev)

  • options (ValidationOptions | None) – Validation options

  • arrow_data (Dict[str, bytes] | None) – Pre-fetched Arrow data keyed by schema ID

Returns:

ValidationResult with check results

Return type:

ValidationResult

async validate_with_data(contract, data, profile='default', options=None)[source]¶

Validate with pre-provided Arrow data.

Parameters:

  • contract (Contract) – The contract to validate

  • data (Dict[str, bytes]) – Arrow IPC data keyed by schema ID

  • profile (str) – Execution profile name

  • options (ValidationOptions | None) – Validation options

Returns:

ValidationResult

Return type:

ValidationResult

async validate_contract_id(contract_id, profile='default', environment='production', sample_size=None)[source]¶

Validate by contract ID (fetches from registry).

Parameters:

  • contract_id (str) – Contract ID to validate

  • profile (str) – Execution profile

  • environment (str) – Environment

  • sample_size (int | None) – Optional sample size

Returns:

ValidationResult

Return type:

ValidationResult

get_available_profiles(contract)[source]¶

Get available profiles for a contract.

Parameters:

contract (Contract)

Return type:

List[str]

get_runtime_capabilities()[source]¶

Get information about available runtimes.

Return type:

Dict[str, Any]

Profile resolver for validation execution.

Resolves execution profiles to determine which checks to run and with what configuration.

class griot_core.validation.profile.ResolvedCheck(check, source, auto_generated=False, priority=0)[source]¶

A check resolved for execution.

Contains all information needed to execute the check.

Parameters:

  • check (Check)

  • source (str)

  • auto_generated (bool)

  • priority (int)

class griot_core.validation.profile.ResolvedProfile(name, description, checks, runtime_preference, timeout_seconds=300, sample_size=None, fail_fast=False)[source]¶

A resolved execution profile.

Contains the checks to run and runtime preferences.

Parameters:

  • name (str)

  • description (str)

  • checks (List[ResolvedCheck])

  • runtime_preference (List[Runtime])

  • timeout_seconds (int)

  • sample_size (int | None)

  • fail_fast (bool)

get_checks_by_type(check_type)[source]¶

Get checks of a specific type.

Parameters:

check_type (CheckType)

Return type:

List[ResolvedCheck]

get_critical_checks()[source]¶

Get all critical checks.

Return type:

List[ResolvedCheck]

class griot_core.validation.profile.ProfileResolver(auto_checks_enabled=True)[source]¶

Resolves execution profiles from contracts.

Determines which checks to run based on the profile configuration, including auto-generated checks from property constraints.

Example

>>> resolver = ProfileResolver()
>>> profile = resolver.resolve(contract, "data_engineering")
>>> for check in profile.checks:
...     print(f"{check.check.name}: {check.check.executor}")
Parameters:

auto_checks_enabled (bool)

__init__(auto_checks_enabled=True)[source]¶

Initialize the profile resolver.

Parameters:

auto_checks_enabled (bool) – Whether to generate auto checks from constraints

resolve(contract, profile_name='default', environment='production')[source]¶

Resolve a profile for a contract.

Parameters:

  • contract (Contract) – The contract to resolve profile for

  • profile_name (str) – Name of the profile to use

  • environment (str) – Environment (for conditional checks)

Returns:

ResolvedProfile with checks to run

Return type:

ResolvedProfile

list_profiles(contract=None)[source]¶

List available profiles.

Parameters:

contract (Contract | None)

Return type:

List[str]

Validation result types.

Defines the result structures returned by the validation engine after running checks against data.

class griot_core.validation.result.ValidationMode(*values)[source]¶

Mode of validation execution.

class griot_core.validation.result.CheckStatus(*values)[source]¶

Status of a check execution.

class griot_core.validation.result.CheckExecutionResult(check_name, status, severity=Severity.WARNING, metric_value=None, threshold=None, operator=None, details=<factory>, samples=<factory>, error_message=None, execution_time_ms=None, executor_id=None, executor_version=None)[source]¶

Result of executing a single check.

Parameters:

  • check_name (str)

  • status (CheckStatus)

  • severity (Severity)

  • metric_value (float | None)

  • threshold (float | None)

  • operator (str | None)

  • details (Dict[str, Any])

  • samples (List[Dict[str, Any]])

  • error_message (str | None)

  • execution_time_ms (float | None)

  • executor_id (str | None)

  • executor_version (str | None)

check_name¶

Name of the check that was executed

Type:

str

status¶

Execution status (passed, failed, skipped, error)

Type:

griot_core.validation.result.CheckStatus

passed¶

Whether the check passed (alias for status == PASSED)

severity¶

Severity level of the check

Type:

griot_core.models.enums.Severity

metric_value¶

The computed metric value

Type:

float | None

threshold¶

The threshold that was applied

Type:

float | None

operator¶

The comparison operator used

Type:

str | None

details¶

Additional details about the check

Type:

Dict[str, Any]

samples¶

Sample rows that failed (for debugging)

Type:

List[Dict[str, Any]]

error_message¶

Error message if status is ERROR

Type:

str | None

execution_time_ms¶

How long the check took to run

Type:

float | None

executor_id¶

ID of the executor that ran the check

Type:

str | None

executor_version¶

Version of the executor

Type:

str | None

property passed: bool¶

Whether the check passed.

property failed: bool¶

Whether the check failed.

property is_critical: bool¶

Whether this is a critical check.

class griot_core.validation.result.SchemaValidationResult(schema_id, schema_name, is_valid, check_results=<factory>, total_checks=0, passed_checks=0, failed_checks=0, critical_failures=0, warnings=0, skipped_checks=0)[source]¶

Result of validating a single schema.

Parameters:

  • schema_id (str)

  • schema_name (str)

  • is_valid (bool)

  • check_results (List[CheckExecutionResult])

  • total_checks (int)

  • passed_checks (int)

  • failed_checks (int)

  • critical_failures (int)

  • warnings (int)

  • skipped_checks (int)

schema_id¶

ID of the schema that was validated

Type:

str

schema_name¶

Name of the schema

Type:

str

is_valid¶

Whether all checks passed

Type:

bool

check_results¶

Results of individual check executions

Type:

List[griot_core.validation.result.CheckExecutionResult]

total_checks¶

Total number of checks run

Type:

int

passed_checks¶

Number of checks that passed

Type:

int

failed_checks¶

Number of checks that failed

Type:

int

critical_failures¶

Number of critical checks that failed

Type:

int

warnings¶

Number of warning-level failures

Type:

int

skipped_checks¶

Number of checks that were skipped

Type:

int

add_result(result)[source]¶

Add a check result and update counts.

Parameters:

result (CheckExecutionResult)

Return type:

None

get_failed_checks()[source]¶

Get all failed check results.

Return type:

List[CheckExecutionResult]

get_critical_failures()[source]¶

Get all critical failures.

Return type:

List[CheckExecutionResult]

class griot_core.validation.result.ValidationSummary(total_schemas=0, valid_schemas=0, invalid_schemas=0, total_checks=0, passed_checks=0, failed_checks=0, critical_failures=0, warnings=0, skipped_checks=0, error_checks=0)[source]¶

Summary of a validation run.

Provides high-level statistics about the validation.

Parameters:

  • total_schemas (int)

  • valid_schemas (int)

  • invalid_schemas (int)

  • total_checks (int)

  • passed_checks (int)

  • failed_checks (int)

  • critical_failures (int)

  • warnings (int)

  • skipped_checks (int)

  • error_checks (int)

property pass_rate: float¶

Calculate the overall pass rate.

class griot_core.validation.result.ValidationResult(is_valid, contract_id, contract_version='1.0.0', profile_used='default', mode=ValidationMode.FULL, schema_results=<factory>, summary=<factory>, inheritance_chain=<factory>, started_at=None, completed_at=None, duration_ms=None, errors=<factory>, warnings=<factory>)[source]¶

Complete result of a validation run.

This is the top-level result returned by the validation engine after validating a contract against data.

Parameters:

  • is_valid (bool)

  • contract_id (str)

  • contract_version (str)

  • profile_used (str)

  • mode (ValidationMode)

  • schema_results (List[SchemaValidationResult])

  • summary (ValidationSummary)

  • inheritance_chain (List[str])

  • started_at (datetime | None)

  • completed_at (datetime | None)

  • duration_ms (float | None)

  • errors (List[str])

  • warnings (List[str])

is_valid¶

Whether the validation passed (no critical failures)

Type:

bool

contract_id¶

ID of the contract that was validated

Type:

str

contract_version¶

Version of the contract

Type:

str

profile_used¶

The execution profile that was used

Type:

str

mode¶

The validation mode that was used

Type:

griot_core.validation.result.ValidationMode

schema_results¶

Results for each schema in the contract

Type:

List[griot_core.validation.result.SchemaValidationResult]

summary¶

Summary statistics

Type:

griot_core.validation.result.ValidationSummary

inheritance_chain¶

Contract inheritance chain (if resolved)

Type:

List[str]

started_at¶

When validation started

Type:

datetime.datetime | None

completed_at¶

When validation completed

Type:

datetime.datetime | None

duration_ms¶

Total duration in milliseconds

Type:

float | None

errors¶

Any errors that occurred during validation

Type:

List[str]

warnings¶

Any warnings from validation

Type:

List[str]

add_schema_result(result)[source]¶

Add a schema result and update summary.

Parameters:

result (SchemaValidationResult)

Return type:

None

get_schema_result(schema_id)[source]¶

Get the result for a specific schema.

Parameters:

schema_id (str)

Return type:

SchemaValidationResult | None

get_all_failures()[source]¶

Get all failed checks across all schemas.

Return type:

List[CheckExecutionResult]

get_all_critical_failures()[source]¶

Get all critical failures across all schemas.

Return type:

List[CheckExecutionResult]

to_dict()[source]¶

Convert the result to a dictionary.

Return type:

Dict[str, Any]

Validation types and configuration.

Defines types used by the validation engine for configuration and context.

class griot_core.validation.types.ProfileConfig(name, description='', checks_include=<factory>, checks_exclude=<factory>, runtime_preference=<factory>, timeout_override=None, sample_size_override=None)[source]¶

Configuration for an execution profile.

Profiles allow different teams to run different subsets of checks with different runtime preferences.

Parameters:

  • name (str)

  • description (str)

  • checks_include (List[str])

  • checks_exclude (List[str])

  • runtime_preference (List[Runtime])

  • timeout_override (int | None)

  • sample_size_override (int | None)

name¶

Profile name (e.g., “data_engineering”)

Type:

str

description¶

Human-readable description

Type:

str

checks_include¶

Checks to include (list or “all”)

Type:

List[str]

checks_exclude¶

Checks to exclude

Type:

List[str]

runtime_preference¶

Preferred runtimes in order

Type:

List[griot_core.models.enums.Runtime]

timeout_override¶

Override default timeout

Type:

int | None

sample_size_override¶

Override default sample size

Type:

int | None

should_run_check(check_name, check_type, check_tags)[source]¶

Determine if a check should run under this profile.

Parameters:

  • check_name (str) – Name of the check

  • check_type (str) – Type of the check (data_quality, privacy, etc.)

  • check_tags (List[str]) – Tags on the check

Returns:

True if the check should run

Return type:

bool

class griot_core.validation.types.ValidationOptions(profile='default', environment='production', sample_size=None, timeout_seconds=300, fail_fast=False, include_samples=True, max_samples=10, dry_run=False, parallel_checks=True)[source]¶

Options for a validation run.

Parameters:

  • profile (str)

  • environment (str)

  • sample_size (int | None)

  • timeout_seconds (int)

  • fail_fast (bool)

  • include_samples (bool)

  • max_samples (int)

  • dry_run (bool)

  • parallel_checks (bool)

profile¶

Profile to use for validation

Type:

str

environment¶

Environment to validate in (prod, staging, dev)

Type:

str

sample_size¶

Optional sample size for sampling validation

Type:

int | None

timeout_seconds¶

Maximum time for validation

Type:

int

fail_fast¶

Stop on first critical failure

Type:

bool

include_samples¶

Include sample failed rows in results

Type:

bool

max_samples¶

Maximum number of sample rows to include

Type:

int

dry_run¶

If True, don’t actually run checks (just validate config)

Type:

bool

parallel_checks¶

Run checks in parallel where possible

Type:

bool

class griot_core.validation.types.ValidationContext(contract_id, contract_version, resolved_contract, options=<factory>, profile_config=None, environment='production', metadata=<factory>)[source]¶

Context for a validation run.

Contains all the information needed to run validation, including the resolved contract, options, and runtime state.

Parameters:

  • contract_id (str)

  • contract_version (str)

  • resolved_contract (Dict[str, Any])

  • options (ValidationOptions)

  • profile_config (ProfileConfig | None)

  • environment (str)

  • metadata (Dict[str, Any])

contract_id¶

ID of the contract being validated

Type:

str

contract_version¶

Version of the contract

Type:

str

resolved_contract¶

The fully resolved contract (inheritance applied)

Type:

Dict[str, Any]

options¶

Validation options

Type:

griot_core.validation.types.ValidationOptions

profile_config¶

Resolved profile configuration

Type:

griot_core.validation.types.ProfileConfig | None

environment¶

Current environment

Type:

str

metadata¶

Additional metadata for the run

Type:

Dict[str, Any]

get_checks_for_schema(schema_id)[source]¶

Get the checks that should run for a schema.

Applies profile filtering to determine which checks to run.

Parameters:

schema_id (str) – ID of the schema

Returns:

List of check configurations to run

Return type:

List[Dict[str, Any]]
